# Legacy Root Source Model

Status: active in repository root.

## Scope

This note tracks the legacy root-level source model before retirement.

- `skills/`
- `commands/`
- `agents/`
- `QWEN.md`
- `AGENTS.md`
- `instructions.md`
- `install.sh`

## Outcome

- toolkit migration was still in progress

## Follow-up

- complete root retirement review
- capture a final retired governance note
